Class BindingImpl

java.lang.Object
org.apache.axis2.jaxws.binding.BindingImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.xml.ws.Binding, Binding
Direct Known Subclasses:
HTTPBinding, SOAPBinding
public abstract class BindingImpl extends Object implements Binding
Classes that would normally "implement jakarta.xml.ws.Binding" should extend this class instead.
